title: Windrush Community Engagement Fund 2025 to 2026: grant funded projects
body: "The 2025 to 2026 Community Engagement Fund provides up to £150,000 of financial support to charity, community and grassroots organisations across the UK.  It will fund projects to raise awareness of, and address misinformation about:   the Windrush Scheme  the Windrush Compensation Scheme    The projects will focus on encouraging non-Caribbean communities to apply to the schemes, and will inform understanding about:   why people are not applying for the schemes how to encourage eligible people to apply to the schemes   Applications for Community Engagement funding opened in April 2025. Funding was awarded to the 15 successful applicants in September and October 2025. "
